ddls:
CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., QB, WR, RB) */,
  "team" TEXT /* Team the player is on */,
  "games" INTEGER /* Number of games played */,
  "snaps" INTEGER /* Total number of snaps played */,
  "snaps_per_game" REAL /* Average number of snaps per game */,
  "snaps_pct" REAL /* Percentage of team snaps played */,
  "rush_pct" REAL /* Percentage of rushing plays */,
  "tgt_pct" REAL /* Percentage of targets */,
  "touch_pct" REAL /* Percentage of touches */,
  "util_pct" REAL /* Percentage of utility (combination of rushing, receiving, and scoring plays) */,
  "fantasy_points" REAL /* Total fantasy points scored */,
  "points_per_100_snaps" REAL /* Fantasy points scored per 100 snaps */,
  "week" INTEGER /* Week of the season */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "player_birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in inches */,
  "player_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in pounds */,
  "player_college" TEXT /* College attended by the player */,
  "player_draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "player_draft_round" INTEGER /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "player_draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "player_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience in the NFL */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player */,
  "player_position" TEXT /* Detailed position (e.g., WR1, RB2) within the team */,
  "fantasy_position" TEXT /* Fantasy position (e.g., QB, WR, RB, TE, FLEX) */,
  "fantasy_points_ppr" REAL /* Fantasy points per reception */,
  "fantasy_points_standard" REAL /* Fantasy points in standard scoring systems */,
  "fantasy_points_half_ppr" REAL /* Fantasy points in half-PPR scoring systems */,
  "player_photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's photo */,
  "player_bio_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's bio */,
  "player_news_feed_url" TEXT /* URL to the player's news feed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)
column_names: Position of the player (e.g., QB, WR, RB)
Average number of snaps per game
Percentage of utility (combination of rushing, receiving, and scoring plays)
Date of birth of the player
Height of the player in inches
Weight of the player in pounds
Round in which the player was drafted
Number of years of experience in the NFL
Current injury status of the player
Detailed position (e.g., WR1, RB2) within the team
Fantasy position (e.g., QB, WR, RB, TE, FLEX)
Fantasy points in standard scoring systems
Fantasy points in half-PPR scoring systems
URL to the player's news feed
